title: clermontia grandiflora subsp. maxima
intro: Clermontia grandiflora subsp. maxima, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus tree, is a flowering plant species native to the island of Hawaii. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Clermontia grandiflora subsp. maxima include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
